title: Sixth National Telecommunications Plan 2023 to 2026
summary: Sets national policy direction for Bahrain’s telecommunications sector, including 5G, IoT, machine-to-machine services, smart verticals, satellite connectivity, private mobile networks, digital economy enablement, and smart kingdom infrastructure.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Current national telecommunications strategy supporting IoT and smart infrastructure.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law and National Frequency Plan 2024
